meta.notes: Accepted manuscript. Figure 3 inset coercive field values read approximately from plot; transcribed numeric values come from text (5200 and 17500 A/m). Table 1 dual columns transcribed as printed.

claims.text: The cooling rate of the melt-quenched films was estimated to be ~10^6 K/s based on the film thickness.

location.quote: The cooling rate of the melt-quenched films was estimated to be ~ 106 K/s based on the film thickness.

claims.predicate: Vc computed from Eq.(1) with delta=40 um is consistent with ~10^6 K/s

claims.text: X-ray analysis revealed a multiphase structure including a BCC-type ordered phase (B2) and intermetallic compounds (Fe, Ni, Co)2B.

location.quote: X-ray analysis revealed a multiphase structure, including a BCC-type ordered phase (structural type B2) and intermetallic compounds (Fe, Ni, Co)2B.

claims.predicate: XRD pattern identifies B2 ordered BCC phase and (Fe,Ni,Co)2B intermetallic

claims.text: In melt-quenched samples, the fraction of the B2 phase increased, leading to a decrease in microhardness from 10400 MPa (as-cast) to 8900 MPa (melt-quenched).

location.quote: the fraction of the B2 phase increased, leading to a decrease in microhardness (from 10400 MPa in as-cast to 8900 MPa in melt-quenched samples)

claims.predicate: as_cast_microhardness_MPa == 10400 AND MQ_microhardness_MPa == 8900 consistent with body text

claims.text: The coercive field of melt-quenched samples (17500 A/m) was significantly higher than that of the as-cast ones (5200 A/m).

location.quote: The coercive field of melt-quenched samples (17500 A/m) was significantly higher than that of the as-cast ones (5200 A/m)

claims.predicate: Hc_MQ == 17500 A/m AND Hc_as_cast == 5200 A/m consistent with body/figure

claims.predicate: phase prediction from parameter values matches literature criteria

claims.predicate: relative XRD peak intensities indicate higher B2 fraction in MQ

location.quote: The as-cast samples exhibited a microhardness of Hμ = 10400±300 MPa, which exceeds the values of the MQ samples (8900±300 MPa).

claims.text: Specific saturation magnetization MS remains practically unchanged: 71 A·m2/kg for as-cast and 73 A·m2/kg for MQ.

location.quote: being 71 A·m2/kg for as-cast and 73 A·m2/kg for MQ samples

claims.scope: as-cast vs MQ FeCoNiB0.7Si0.3Be, room temperature

claims.text: Rapid quenching (up to 10^6 K/s) increases the fraction of the B2 phase and reduces the content of the intermetallic phase.

claims.predicate: increased cooling rate -> increased B2 fraction, decreased intermetallic fraction

claims.predicate: higher cooling rate -> higher Hc (causal attribution to refinement/microstresses)
